description: A dashboard that monitors ArgoCD with a focus on the operational side of ArgoCD. The dashboards were generated using [argo-cd-mixin](https://github.com/adinhodovic/argo-cd-mixin). Open issues and create feature requests in the repository.

panels.description: The total number of clusters being managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Clusters

panels.description: The total number of Git repositories being monitored by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Repositories

panels.description: The total number of applications being managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Applications

panels.description: The distribution of application health statuses managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Health Status

panels.description: The distribution of application sync statuses managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Sync Status

panels.description: A table listing all applications managed by ArgoCD, along with their health and sync statuses.
panels.title: Applications

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing sync activity for applications managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Sync Activity

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing sync failures for applications managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Sync Failures

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing reconciliation activity for applications managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Reconciliation Activity

panels.description: A heatmap panel showing reconciliation performance for applications managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Reconciliation Performance

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing Kubernetes API activity for applications managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: K8s API Activity

panels.description: Time to process resource events in batches. Controlled by ARGOCD_CLUSTER_CACHE_BATCH_EVENTS_PROCESSING and related settings.
panels.title: Resource Event Processing Duration

panels.description: Number of resource events processed per batch. Batch processing improves performance when managing large numbers of resources.
panels.title: Resource Events Batch Size

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing pending kubectl runs for ArgoCD.
panels.title: Pending Kubectl Runs

panels.description: Total kubectl executions for manifest generation (Helm, Kustomize, plugins). High counts are expected during sync operations.
panels.title: Kubectl Exec Total

panels.description: Rate of kubectl requests by container, method, and code.
panels.title: Kubectl Requests Total

panels.description: Distribution of kubectl requests by host over the last 6 hours.
panels.title: Kubectl Requests Total by Host (6h)

panels.description: P95 kubectl request duration by container and verb. High values indicate slow kubectl operations against the Kubernetes API.
panels.title: Kubectl Request Duration by Verb (P95)

panels.description: Distribution of kubectl request duration by host over the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Kubectl Request Duration by Host (6h)

panels.description: Rate of kubectl request retries by container, method, and code. Elevated retry rates indicate transient Kubernetes API errors or throttling.
panels.title: Kubectl Request Retries

panels.description: Distribution of kubectl request retries by host over the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Kubectl Request Retries by Host (6h)

panels.description: P95 time spent waiting in the kubectl client-side rate limiter per host. High values indicate the Kubernetes API server is throttling ArgoCD requests.
panels.title: Kubectl Rate Limiter Duration (P95)

panels.description: Distribution of P95 kubectl rate limiter duration by host over the last 6 hours.
panels.title: Kubectl Rate Limiter Duration P95 by Host (6h)

panels.description: Distribution of kubectl request payload sizes. Large request sizes may impact API server performance.
panels.title: Kubectl Request Size

panels.description: Distribution of kubectl response payload sizes. Large response sizes may indicate wide resource fetches and can impact controller memory usage.
panels.title: Kubectl Response Size

panels.description: Total kubectl exec plugin calls by call status and exit code. Failed call statuses or non-zero codes indicate credential plugin authentication issues.
panels.title: Kubectl Exec Plugin Calls

panels.description: Total number of kubectl transport create calls. High values may indicate frequent transport recreation due to credential rotation or connection churn.
panels.title: Kubectl Transport Create Calls

panels.description: Total number of gRPC RPCs completed on the API server by service, method, and response code.
panels.title: gRPC Requests Handled

panels.description: Total number of gRPC stream messages sent by the API server.
panels.title: gRPC Messages Sent

panels.description: P50 server-side gRPC handling duration by service and method.
panels.title: gRPC Server Handling Duration (P50)

panels.description: P95 server-side gRPC handling duration by service and method.
panels.title: gRPC Server Handling Duration (P95)

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing the connection status of each cluster managed by ArgoCD. Failed connections indicate cluster connectivity or authentication issues.
panels.title: Cluster Connection Status

panels.description: Age of the cluster cache in seconds. Stale caches (high values) can cause reconciliation delays and performance issues.
panels.title: Cluster Cache Age

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing the number of resource objects in each cluster managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Resource Objects

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing the number of API resources in each cluster managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: API Resources

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing cluster events for clusters managed by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Cluster Events

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing pending requests in the ArgoCD repo server queue. High values may indicate the repo server needs scaling.
panels.title: Pending Repo Requests

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing git fetch failures for repositories monitored by ArgoCD. High values may indicate git repository connectivity or authentication issues.
panels.title: Git Fetch Failures

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing git ls-remote requests made by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Git Requests (ls-remote)

panels.description: A timeseries panel showing git checkout requests made by ArgoCD.
panels.title: Git Requests (checkout)

panels.description: A heatmap panel showing git fetch performance for ArgoCD.
panels.title: Git Fetch Performance

panels.description: A heatmap panel showing git ls-remote performance for ArgoCD.
panels.title: Git Ls-remote Performance

panels.description: Rate of Redis requests by ArgoCD component. High rates may indicate Redis becoming a bottleneck at scale.
panels.title: Redis Request Rate

panels.description: Redis request latency distribution. High latencies indicate Redis performance issues that can affect controller scalability.
panels.title: Redis Request Duration

title: ArgoCD / Operational / Overview
